# S1 PR Template

## Stage overview

Stage `S1` covers the Phase 8 retrieval main brain. Use this template when the PR changes retrieval orchestration, source selection, ranking, bundle shaping, retrieval-side guards, or related verification docs. Keep the brief, byte-locks, and final SEAL mapping visible throughout review.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The PR closes the intended `P8-` tasks for Stage `S1`.
- [ ] Retrieval behavior, bundle shape, and guard rails match the approved brief exactly.
- [ ] Byte-locked retrieval-adjacent paths remain untouched unless the brief explicitly allows them.
- [ ] Fresh build, test, and focused retrieval verification evidence is attached.
- [ ] The Notion row can map to the final verified or SEAL commit without ambiguity.

## Scope - files touched + byte-locks

- Files touched:
  - `{{path}}`
  - `{{path}}`
- Byte-locked / forbidden paths checked:
  - `{{path or command}}`
  - `{{path or command}}`
- Brief: `{{docs/briefs/YYYY-MM-DD-batchXX-slug.md}}`

Reviewer dialogue:
{{required if src/core/contracts/enums.ts changes}}

Downstream compatibility report:
{{required if src/core/contracts/enums.ts changes}}

## Testing - what must pass before merge

- `set -o pipefail; npm run build`
- `set -o pipefail; npm test`
- `{{focused retrieval grep, diff, or test check from the brief}}`

## Rollback - how to revert if needed

- Revert the PR or final SEAL commit.
- Restore the previous retrieval behavior from the last verified commit.
- Re-run the Stage `S1` verification commands before reopening follow-up work.
